docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,125.00 FILED BY CARTER JOHNNY J. AS TO DEFENDANT LAO VERUNDA V.AKA LAO MONICA V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
